home.hero_subtitle: Authentic Afghan, Persian & Oriental masterpieces, curated for the discerning home.
home.hero_subtitle_line1: Over 95,000 Hand-Knotted Rugs with Character, curated for the modern connoisseur of ancient artistry.
home.shop_by_style_desc: Curated selections to match your home's unique personality.
home.authentic_handmade_desc: Every rug in our collection is a unique masterpiece, hand-knotted by artisans using techniques passed down through generations.
home.curated_collection_desc: With over 95,000 pieces, we offer the world's most extensive curated selection of high-end rugs.
home.worldwide_shipping_desc: We bring the bazaar to your doorstep with white-glove, insured shipping to over 150 countries.
home.our_story_text: For generations, we have sourced the finest hand-knotted rugs from the ancient weaving regions of Afghanistan, Persia and beyond.
home.legacy_text1: Afghan Tappeti was born from a passion for the loom and a commitment to preserving the nomadic heritage of Central Asia.
home.legacy_text2: Today, we bridge the gap between ancient craftsmanship and contemporary luxury, sourcing directly from weaving families.
home.review_1_text: The Khal Mohammadi rug I received is even more stunning in person. The depth of color is unlike anything found in mass-produced pieces. It has completely transformed our living space.
home.review_2_text: Incredible curation. Finding authentic vintage Oushaks in this condition is a rarity. Afghan Tappeti is now my go-to for all my high-end residential projects.
home.review_3_text: The white-glove delivery to New York was seamless. The rug was packaged with extreme care. It's truly a piece of history on our floor.
home.instagram_text: Tag us to be featured in our lifestyle gallery.
home.newsletter_title: Become Part of the Afghan Tappeti Family
home.newsletter_subtitle: Subscribe to receive exclusive collection previews, artisan stories, and interior design inspiration.

about.heritage_text: Afghan Tappeti was born from a deep reverence for the ancient art of hand-knotting. For centuries, the weavers of Afghanistan, Persia and Anatolia have passed down techniques that transform raw wool and natural dyes into heirloom masterpieces.
about.knotting_text: Every rug in our collection is entirely hand-knotted — a process that can take months or even years to complete. Each knot is tied by hand, following patterns held in memory and tradition.
about.ethical_text: We work directly with weaving families and cooperatives, ensuring fair wages and preserving traditions that might otherwise be lost. Every purchase supports artisan communities.
about.quote: A rug is not made to be walked on. It is made to be walked through — a landscape of thread and color.
about.hero_title_line1: The Heritage of the Silk Road
about.hero_subtitle: Weaving the past into the modern home with timeless craftsmanship from the heart of Afghanistan.
about.heritage_p1: For three generations, the Afghan Tappeti family has curated the finest hand-knotted rugs from the nomadic tribes and urban master-weavers of Herat and Persia.
about.heritage_p2: Each rug is more than a floor covering; it is a repository of history, featuring motifs passed down through centuries.
about.knotting_intro: A single Afghan Tappeti can take up to 14 months to complete. Our artisans use the traditional asymmetrical knotting technique, ensuring a level of detail and durability that machine-made replicas can never achieve.
about.knotting_1_text: We use only organic dyes derived from madder root, pomegranate rinds, and indigo—colors that age gracefully over decades.
about.knotting_2_text: Every rug begins on a vertical loom, where the weaver translates mental maps into intricate physical patterns knot by knot.
about.knotting_3_text: After weaving, the rug is sheared and washed in mountain spring water to bring out the natural luster of the wool.
about.ethical_1_text: We believe in a transparent supply chain. Our weavers are partners, not just producers. We ensure fair living wages that are 40% above the local industry average.
about.ethical_2_text: Traditional methods are inherently sustainable. By using locally sourced Ghazni wool and plant-based dyes, we minimize our ecological footprint.
about.quote_text: A rug is the soul of the room. It anchors the space and carries the echoes of ancient winds.

blog.title: Our Journal
blog.subtitle: Stories from the world of hand-knotted rugs.
blog.fallback_p1: The art of Persian rug making is one of the oldest continuous craft traditions in the world.
blog.fallback_p2: From the royal workshops of Safavid Isfahan to the nomadic tribes of Fars province, each region developed its own distinctive patterns.

styles.title: Shop by Style
styles.subtitle: Curated selections to match your home's unique personality.

scandinavian.name: Scandinavian
scandinavian.desc: Light, airy spaces call for rugs with understated patterns and natural textures. Our Scandinavian collection features muted tones and simple geometric motifs.

classic.name: Classic
classic.desc: Timeless elegance meets traditional craftsmanship. Our Classic collection showcases medallion patterns, rich borders, and heritage designs.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.desc: Clean lines and neutral palettes define modern minimalism. These rugs provide subtle texture and warmth without overwhelming the space.

bohemian.name: Bohemian
bohemian.desc: Free-spirited and eclectic, our Bohemian collection brings vibrant colors, tribal motifs, and artistic expression to any room.

luxury.name: Luxury
luxury.desc: Indulge in the finest silk and hand-spun wool rugs. Each piece is a masterpiece of luxury craftsmanship, designed for discerning collectors.

modern.name: Modern
modern.desc: Bold abstracts, contemporary patterns, and innovative designs define our Modern collection — perfect for today's forward-thinking interiors.

rooms.title: Find Your Perfect Space
rooms.subtitle: Discover the ideal rug for every room in your home.

living_room.name: Living Room
living_room.desc: The heart of your home deserves a rug that anchors the space with warmth and style. From large-format traditional pieces to contemporary statement rugs.

bedroom.name: Bedroom
bedroom.desc: Create a serene sanctuary with plush, soft rugs that invite bare feet. Our bedroom selection prioritizes comfort without compromising on beauty.

dining_room.name: Dining Room
dining_room.desc: Make every meal memorable with a rug that defines the dining area. Durable yet elegant, our dining room rugs are designed to withstand daily use.

office.name: Home Office
office.desc: Elevate your workspace with a rug that inspires productivity and comfort. Professional patterns meet durable construction for the modern home office.

hallway.name: Hallway & Entryway
hallway.desc: Make a lasting first impression. Our runner and entryway rugs are crafted for high-traffic areas while adding a touch of sophistication.

nursery.name: Nursery & Kids Room
nursery.desc: Safe, soft, and delightful — our nursery collection uses natural materials and low-pile weaves, perfect for little ones to play and grow.
